channel.title: EU AI Act on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in EU AI Act on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001): AI Governance, Risk, and Compliance
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "AI Governance" , "Risk Management" , "Compliance" , "Responsible AI" , "AI Ethics" , "AI Security" , "CY0-001" , "NIST AI RMF" , "EU AI Act"
item.description: Master AI governance, risk, and compliance for the CompTIA SecAI+ CY0-001 exam. Learn AI governance structures, roles, responsible AI principles, AI risks, and frameworks like the EU AI Act and NIST AI RMF.

item.title: CompTIA SecAI+ Course: Complete Study Guide for the CY0-001 Exam
item.category: "CompTIA SecAI+ Course" , "CY0-001 Certification" , "AI Security" , "Machine Learning Security" , "LLM Security" , "AI Governance Risk Compliance" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Artificial Intelligence" , "Adversarial Machine Learning" , "Responsible AI"
item.description: A comprehensive CompTIA SecAI+ (CY0-001) study course covering basic AI concepts, securing AI systems, AI-assisted security, and AI governance, risk, and compliance for cybersecurity practitioners.
